REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST TO POSTPONE FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR JUDICIAL & REVIEW.) FILED BY DEFENDANT HU, ALBERT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-02-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-02-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JUDY LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALBERT HU IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, JUDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HU, ALBERT CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
